package rulecoverage

func PositiveGinRoutePathsRepeatedAsRawStrings() string {
    ruleID := "gin_route_paths_repeated_as_raw_strings"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repeated route path literals that should be centralized or grouped more intentionally."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
